machete.desc: A wide blade, well-balanced. Good for cutting through dense undergrowth.

lantern.desc: An oil lantern with a wire handle. It throws good light.

climbing_gear.desc: Rope, hooks, and a worn harness. It is enough to climb the cliff.

raft.desc: Logs lashed together with rope. Unwieldy, but it will float.

note.desc: A folded note with quick instructions and a warning.

old_map.desc: A hand-drawn map on oilskin. The ink has held.

food.desc: Berries, bark, whatever you can find.

old_map_text: Drawn in rough strokes on oilskin. Hard to read in the dark.
A cabin is marked to the north, past thick trees.
A word is crossed out beneath it. You can make out: DO NOT STAY.
The river runs wide. An X marks something on the far bank.
Below the X: one word. SUPPLIES.
In the top corner, a lighthouse is drawn on high ground.
A line runs from the lighthouse down to the cliff face.
intro_text: You wake in a cold clearing with a pounding head.
Objective: reach the lighthouse top and signal SOS.
Hint: type help to see commands, and read note for your starting guidance.
note_text: Reach the lighthouse on high ground.
- Use go north/south/east/west or arrow keys to move.
- Use look and examine <feature> to find clues.
- Use take <item>, read <item>, and use <item> to progress.
Take the machete in the clearing.
Go north, enter the cabin, and gather the lantern with oil plus climbing gear.
Use the climbing gear at the cliff to reach the lighthouse, climb to the top, and signal SOS.

rooms.name: Forest Clearing
rooms.description:
You stand in a wide clearing. Pale light filters through the canopy overhead. The forest grows thick to the north. You can hear branches snapping in there. A trail runs south toward the sound of running water. To the east the trees thin, then darken strangely around a hillside. Grey cliffs rise to the west through the treeline.

A machete is buried in a stump near the centre. A folded note is pinned beneath the grip.
rooms.description_with_lantern: Your lantern pushes the dark back. The clearing feels smaller in the light. The trail south is easier to read now, with fresh boot prints in the mud.

features.label: S
features.desc: An old stump, chest high. A machete is buried blade-first in the top.
features.examine_clue: The blade is well-balanced. The grip is wrapped in cord. A folded note is pinned beneath it. Take both items.

features.label: F
features.desc: A ring of stones with cold ash inside. Someone camped here recently.
features.examine_clue: Under the ash: a scrap of cloth with a crude arrow pointing north. Something is up there.

features.label: T
features.desc: A broken branch tied to a trunk with cord. It points south toward the river.
features.examine_clue: The cord is fresh. Someone marked this trail within the last day. They went south.

rooms.name: Thick Forest
rooms.description: You push through the last of the brambles into dense forest. The canopy closes out the sky. A dark cabin sits between two ancient oaks, its door hanging open. Someone lived here once, or tried to.
rooms.description_with_lantern: The lantern fills the cabin with warm light. You can see the gear stacked in the corner clearly now: climbing gear and a bundled raft.

requires.message: Dense brambles tear at you. You need a machete to cut through.

features.label: C
features.desc: A rough timber cabin, door hanging open. The inside is dim but dry. Gear is stacked against the back wall.
features.examine_clue: You look around inside and find a lantern with oil, climbing gear on a peg, and a raft bundled in the corner. Take what you need.

features.label: L
features.desc: A massive fallen oak. You had to climb over it to get here.
features.examine_clue: Old axe marks on the stump. This tree was cut down, not blown over. Someone wanted this path blocked.

rooms.name: Riverbank
rooms.description: The path ends at a wide dark river. The current runs fast and cold, and you can feel the spray from here. A rope post on the near bank suggests someone once ran a crossing. The rope is long gone.
rooms.description_with_raft: You are carrying the raft. The flat rock near the post is a good launch point. The far bank looks reachable from here.

features.label: P
features.desc: A thick post driven into the bank. Frayed rope is knotted at the top, cut clean on the far side long ago.
features.examine_clue: The fraying was cut from the far side. Someone didn't want you to follow.

features.label: R
features.desc: A flat rock jutting into the river. Good place to launch from.
features.examine_clue: Drag marks on the surface. Someone launched a raft from this exact spot before.

rooms.name: Cave
rooms.description: A cave mouth opens in the hillside. The dark inside is absolute, a black you could touch. You can smell cold stone and old smoke.
rooms.description_with_lantern: The lantern fills the cave with shifting light. Faded paint marks spread across one wall, and a flat stone sits near the back.

requires.message: The cave is pitch black. You need a lantern to enter safely.

features.label: X
features.desc: A flat stone sits below a faded cave painting scratched into the wall. An oilskin map is tucked into a crack beneath it.
features.examine_clue: In the lantern light you make out a painted tiger and a rough arrow pointing west toward higher ground. The oilskin map marks the lighthouse route.

rooms.name: Far Shore
rooms.description: The far bank. Dense reeds and dark mud. Something is half-buried in the silt, but you cannot make it out in the dark. You will need to come back better prepared.

requires.message: The river is too fast and wide to cross. You need a raft.

rooms.name: Mountain Pass
rooms.description: You climb onto a broad cliff shelf of weathered grey stone. The lighthouse stands ahead on high ground, white tower against dark sky. Its heavy door is half open. To the west, a blue bay opens into the ocean below the cliffs.

requires.message: The cliff is sheer. You need climbing gear to ascend.

features.label: H
features.desc: A weather-beaten lighthouse rises from the cliff top. Salt and wind have scarred the white paint.
features.examine_clue: The lantern room still has dry fuel and a striker. This is the signal point the note described.

features.label: E
features.desc: The cliff edge drops to dark water. Waves crash into the bay below.
features.examine_clue: The river mouth bends into the bay here, then empties into the open ocean.

rooms.name: Lighthouse Interior
rooms.description: You step into the lighthouse and pull the door shut against the wind. A spiral iron staircase winds upward into the dark lantern room.

features.label: S
features.desc: Narrow iron stairs curl around the wall toward the lantern room.
features.examine_clue: The top platform holds the signal lens and brazier. One more climb and you can send a distress signal.

rooms.name: Lantern Room
rooms.description: You reach the top beneath thick glass panes. A cold brazier sits below the lighthouse lens, and the old shutters still move on their gears.

features.label: B
features.desc: A wide brass brazier packed with dry fuel and wick rope.
features.examine_clue: Everything is ready. Light it and signal three long, three short, three long flashes: SOS.

features.label: L
features.desc: The lighthouse lens towers over you, polished and waiting.
features.examine_clue: With the fire lit, this lens will throw a bright SOS beam across the bay and out to sea.
